key_events_next_24h.name: Fed Officials Post-FOMC Speeches (after Apr 29 hold at 3.5-3.75%)
BTC Mining Difficulty Drop (135.59T -> 131.43T, reduces miner sell pressure)
Consensus 2026 Miami Conference pre-event positioning begins (May 5-7)

notes: ETF 유입 강세·기관 매수, $80K 저항·매크로 불확실성 혼조

analysis.btc_price_note: BTC rose to $78,324 on May 2 (up from $76,550 on May 1, +2.4%). April closed +14% MoM. Key resistance at $80K not yet broken. All-time high $126,198 (Oct 2025) — currently ~52% below ATH. Fear & Greed Index at 26-29 (Fear territory, recovering from extreme low of 8 in early April).
sentiment_key_signals: BTC +2.4% on May 2 ($76,550 -> $78,324) — recovery momentum toward $80K resistance
April ETF inflows $2.44B — strongest institutional month since October 2025
Futures funding rate -5% 30-day avg — rare bearish futures signal despite rising spot
Retail sentiment in extreme fear (F&G 26-29); whale wallets continue accumulating
Technical indicators: 18 bullish vs 4 bearish (RSI 55.65, neutral)
FOMC held 3.5-3.75% on April 29 (8-4 contentious vote) — no rate hike
CPI March 3.3% YoY (above 2% Fed target); zero rate cuts in 2026 at 59% Polymarket
Oil prices surged to $115 (Iran Strait of Hormuz blockade) — macro headwind
Mining difficulty dropped 135.59T -> 131.43T (May 2) — reduces miner sell pressure
SEC approved IBIT option position limit raised to 1M contracts
Goldman Sachs filed for Bitcoin Premium Income ETF
Consensus 2026 conference May 5-7 Miami — upcoming sentiment catalyst
Powell term ends May 15; Kevin Warsh nominated as next Fed Chair — transition risk
Senate stablecoin yield compromise removing legislative roadblock — positive
Ark Invest projects BTC market cap to $16T by 2030
analysis.macro_backdrop: FOMC held 3.5-3.75% on Apr 29 — most dissents (4) since 1992. CPI at 3.3% well above 2% target. Key today: Initial Jobless Claims 12:30 UTC + Fed speeches 15:00 UTC. Next: ISM Services May 5, NFP May 8, CPI/PPI May 13. Fed leadership transition (Powell exits May 15, Warsh incoming) adds uncertainty. Oil at $115 inflation driver.
analysis.regime_rationale: Neutral (0.50): BTC recovering with strong institutional backing (ETF $2.44B April, whale accumulation, mining sell pressure down, 18/4 bullish technical indicators). However, macro headwinds are material — inflation 3.3%, no rate cuts expected, oil at $115, Fed transition uncertainty, futures funding -5% (bearish speculative sentiment). Fear & Greed at 26-29. $80K resistance not yet breached. Bot macro filter ACTIVE at 0.50 threshold.
